name: Hubtel Ghana Payment and Commerce API
what_it_does: Hubtel Ghana payment and commerce REST API for businesses to accept mobile money (MTN Mobile Money, Vodafone Cash, AirtelTigo Money), card payments, and process SMS/USSD-based transactions through Ghana's leading digital commerce infrastructure platform, enabling merchants to reach Ghana's 15M+ mobile money users for e-commerce, utility, insurance, and enterprise payment collection. Enables AI agents to manage mobile money payment collection for Ghana checkout automation, handle card payment for Ghana e-commerce automation, access SMS and USSD payment for Ghana offline payment automation, retrieve payment status for Ghana transaction confirmation automation, manage bulk disbursement for Ghana payroll and NGO payment automation, handle subscription billing for Ghana recurring payment automation, access checkout widget for Ghana embedded payment automation, retrieve transaction analytics for Ghana payment reporting automation, manage refund processing for Ghana order management automation, and integrate Hubtel with Ghanaian e-commerce, utility, insurance, and enterprise platforms for end-to-end Ghana payment and commerce automation.
use_cases: Collecting MTN MoMo and Vodafone Cash for Ghana e-commerce checkout agents
Processing mobile money for Ghana utility and bill payment agents
Disbursing to Ghana mobile wallets from NGO and payroll agents
Accepting card and mobile money together from Ghana merchant checkout agents
not_for: Non-Ghana markets (Hubtel is Ghana-focused payment infrastructure)
International card acquiring (Hubtel is Ghana domestic payment focus)
High-volume global enterprise (Hubtel is Ghana market specialized)
best_when: A Ghanaian business, utility, insurer, or enterprise wanting AI agents to automate mobile money, card, and USSD payment collection through Hubtel's Ghana-native digital commerce infrastructure covering all three Ghanaian mobile money providers.
avoid_when: MOBILE MONEY SUBSCRIBER VALIDATION: Hubtel mobile money collection requires active subscriber on respective network (MTN, Vodafone, AirtelTigo); automated payment must check network subscription; automated payment to wrong network for phone number creates subscriber_not_found. PROMPT-TO-PAY IS ASYNC: Hubtel mobile money uses prompt-to-pay (push USSD to consumer's phone); automated checkout must await consumer phone approval not expect immediate confirmation; automated synchronous fulfillment after initiation creates premature order processing. SALES_CHANNEL AND CLIENT_ID REQUIRED: Hubtel requires specific clientId and salesChannel parameters; automated requests must include correct channel configuration; automated missing channel parameters creates invalid_channel error. WEBHOOK MUST BE PUBLIC HTTPS: Hubtel payment callback requires public HTTPS URL; automated integration must expose public callback URL; automated localhost webhook creates callback delivery failure.

auth.notes: Hubtel uses OAuth 2.0 (client credentials) for API authentication. REST API with JSON. Accra, Ghana HQ. Founded 2012 by Alex Bram and others (formerly Smsgh). Products: Mobile money (MTN MoMo, Vodafone Cash, AirtelTigo), card, SMS/USSD checkout, bulk payment, subscription, insurance payments. SDKs: .NET, PHP, Node.js, Java. Bank of Ghana (BOG)-licensed. Serves 80,000+ Ghanaian merchants. Competes with ExpressPay for Ghana digital commerce.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox free; production requires Hubtel business account
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-transaction fees: mobile money 1-1.5% + GHS 0.50; card 2.5% + flat fee; volume discounts
pricing.notes: Accra GH. BOG licensed. Per-transaction pricing in GHS. Ghana fintech market leader.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; mobile money and card APIs throttled; webhooks for payment events

known_agent_gotchas: CLIENT_ID AND CLIENT_SECRET REQUIRED IN HEADERS: Hubtel uses clientId and clientSecret in Authorization header (Basic auth base64); automated request must encode credentials correctly; automated API-key-only auth without basic encoding creates unauthorized error

MOBILE MONEY IS PROMPT-TO-PAY: Hubtel mobile money sends USSD prompt to consumer phone; automated checkout must await consumer's phone approval; automated immediate fulfillment after payment initiation creates premature order processing before consumer approves

CLIENTREFERENCE IS MERCHANT IDEMPOTENCY KEY: Hubtel supports clientReference for idempotency; automated payments must use unique clientReference; automated retry with new clientReference creates duplicate payment if original succeeded

CALLBACK URL MUST BE PUBLICLY ACCESSIBLE: Hubtel delivers payment result to callbackUrl; automated integration must provide public HTTPS callbackUrl; automated localhost/private URL creates callback delivery failure and missed payment events

NETWORK CODE REQUIRED FOR MOBILE MONEY: Hubtel requires specifying mobile network code (MTN=mtn-gh, Vodafone=vodafone-gh, AirtelTigo=tigo-gh); automated mobile money must identify customer network; automated wrong network code creates subscriber_not_found for customer
agent_readiness.security_notes: Ghana payment. BOG-licensed. OAuth2 Basic. GH. Mobile money and card payment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Ghana payments. BOG licensed. OAuth2. GH. Mobile money and card data.
